title: Academic Context 2
instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct word.

sentences.text: The _____ of democracy is based on the idea that all citizens have equal rights.
The experimental results were _____ with the theoretical predictions.
The Supreme Court ruled that the law was _____ and therefore invalid.
Understanding the historical _____ is crucial for interpreting this ancient text.
Both parties signed the _____ agreeing to all terms and conditions.
The artist managed to _____ a unique style that influenced many others.
The researchers collected extensive _____ to support their conclusions.
A clear _____ of terms is essential for effective communication.
